name: RecoilStateBase::ScalarDeletingDestructor
description: RecoilStateBase::ScalarDeletingDestructor restores the base state vtable, conditionally frees this when bit 0 of the flags argument is set, and returns this.
known_limits: Binary-safe verification remains tracked separately by the recoil_state_base VC target.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly/decompilation for 0x407170 validates the RecoilStateBase vtable write, conditional operator delete when flags bit 0 is set, returning this, and callee stack cleanup for the flags argument.
The native smoke verifies the flags=0 caller-owned path returns this and restores the RecoilStateBase vtable, then exercises the flags=1 heap-delete path and verifies the returned self pointer.
